title: Microula myosotidea
taxonomy: Microula myosotidea is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Microula, which is a small group of flowering plants native to the Himalayas and nearby regions. The plant is often classified as a member of the order Lamiales, a group that includes other flowering plants such as mint and honeysuckle. Microula myosotidea is closely related to other species of Microula, which are known for their small, delicate flowers and slender stems. Further classification of the plant is often based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis.
